meta.title: Soso Kartozia — Strategic Leader & Data Analyst
meta.description: Strategic Leader, Data-Driven Builder, and Co-Founder. Open to new opportunities and interesting challenges.

2025.title: Co-Founder & Strategic Leader
2025.intro: Co-founded and lead 'Youth-GE Georgia,' an NGO dedicated to youth development through educational programs, international exchanges, and regional initiatives. I manage overall operations, strategic direction, and technical systems for our projects.

bullets.label: Program Delivery:
bullets.detail: Design and run local and international youth projects, trainings, and Erasmus+ exchanges, managing them from concept to execution.

bullets.label: Technical Operations:
bullets.detail: Set up and manage the digital tools, websites, and database systems that support our day-to-day operations and public campaigns.

bullets.label: Event Operations & Partnerships:
bullets.detail: Coordinate technical and operational support for partner organization events, including managing full logistics for the 'Mind Up' English Language Olympiad.

2024.title: Form 2 Specialist
2024.intro: Manage the financial and technical documentation for commercial and residential construction projects. I handle acts of completed works (Form No. 2), estimate material costs, and monitor project budgets to keep execution transparent and on-budget.

bullets.label: Form No. 2 Management:
bullets.detail: Compile and verify official acts of completed works for active and completed construction sites, ensuring strict compliance with local standards.

bullets.label: Estimates & Cost Control:
bullets.detail: Calculate material requirements and labor costs based on architectural blueprints, helping to prevent resource waste and budget overruns.

bullets.label: Reporting & Field Coordination:
bullets.detail: Analyze planned vs. actual expenditures to report variances to management, collaborating closely with project engineers and site managers to verify work volumes.

2025-mun.title: Model United Nations (MUN) Faculty Advisor
2025-mun.intro: Represented Georgia as a Faculty Advisor at the International MUN conference in Münster, Germany, guiding youth delegates in multilateral diplomacy and policy analysis.

bullets.label: Mentorship & Preparation:
bullets.detail: Coached students in research methods, drafting policy papers, and public speaking, helping them prepare for international debates.

bullets.label: Procedural Guidance:
bullets.detail: Supported delegates during committee sessions, helping them navigate complex rules of procedure and form collaborative alliances.

2024-oct.title: Erasmus+ Exchange Participant
2024-oct.intro: Participated in an Erasmus+ youth exchange program focused on cultural dialogue, European youth networks, and non-formal education methodologies.

bullets.label: Cross-Border Networking:
bullets.detail: Built connections with youth activists across Europe to discuss future collaboration and regional projects.

bullets.label: Skill Development:
bullets.detail: Participated in workshops on civic participation, leadership, and non-formal educational practices.

2024-apr.title: Erasmus+ Exchange Participant
2024-apr.intro: Participated in an Erasmus+ youth exchange initiative centered on regional cooperation, sustainable development, and youth leadership in the Caucasus.

bullets.label: Regional Dialogues:
bullets.detail: Engaged in joint discussions on regional development and civic responsibility with youth from the Caucasus.

bullets.label: Leadership Workshops:
bullets.detail: Participated in training sessions designed to build practical leadership skills for emerging community organizers.

2023.title: Road Manager
2023.intro: Managed day-to-day logistics and field operations, optimizing route planning and coordinating transport schedules to ensure timely deliveries.

bullets.label: Logistics & Dispatch:
bullets.detail: Planned and coordinated daily routes and transport schedules, monitoring active field operations for efficiency.

bullets.label: Resource Allocation:
bullets.detail: Managed driver schedules and fuel resources, reducing operational costs while maintaining delivery reliability.

bullets.label: Crisis Management:
bullets.detail: Resolved delays and logistical bottlenecks on the spot, making quick decisions to keep shipments moving.

2021.title: Credit Risk Analyst
2021.intro: Analyzed credit risks and updated risk management strategies at Space. I wrote and maintained Java-based decision-making code, analyzed loan rejection patterns, and supported partner merchants in integrating our installment products, leading a small dedicated team.

bullets.label: Java Risk Engineering:
bullets.detail: Maintained and updated the automated credit decision-making logic in Java, aligning execution directly with business policies and credit risk limits.

bullets.label: Rejection Analysis & Reporting:
bullets.detail: Monitored loan application outcomes, investigated rejection root causes, and presented data-driven reports and ideas to improve acceptance rates.

bullets.label: Merchant Installment Support:
bullets.detail: Partnered with e-commerce merchants to help them integrate our API and installment payment options into their checkout systems.

bullets.label: Team Coordination:
bullets.detail: Guided a small, focused team responsible for managing risk rules and technical integration support.

contact.title: LET'S CONNECT
contact.description: Open to new opportunities and interesting challenges.
